cards.prompt: LINQ to Objects: a custom yield iterator gets all standard operators for free
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; using System.Collections.Generic; IEnumerable<int> Gen(){ yield return 3; yield return 1; yield return 4; yield return 1; yield return 5; } var r = Gen().Where(x => x > 1).Distinct().OrderBy(x => x); Console.WriteLine(string.Join(",", r));

cards.prompt: In-memory provider streams a lazy infinite source: Where + Take(4) pulls only 4
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; using System.Collections.Generic; IEnumerable<int> Naturals(){ int i = 1; while(true) yield return i++; } var r = Naturals().Where(x => x % 3 == 0).Take(4); Console.WriteLine(string.Join(",", r));

cards.prompt: In-memory provider projects then aggregates immediately: sum of squares 1..5
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; var r = Enumerable.Range(1, 5).Select(x => x * x).Sum(); Console.WriteLine(r);
